message:
feat(engine): expand enrichment test suites, seqlock/escape analysis modules, and benchmark split report

New enrichment integration test suites (2,513 lines):
- gc_pause_enrichment_integration.rs (660 lines): ring-buffer eviction
  edge cases, percentile computation invariants, histogram boundary
  conditions, budget checking with mixed thresholds
- polymorphic_inline_cache_enrichment_integration.rs (988 lines):
  PIC slot management, megamorphic transitions, inline cache eviction,
  type feedback accumulation for RGC-606B
- tier_eligibility_substrate_enrichment_integration.rs (865 lines):
  tier promotion/demotion, eligibility predicate evaluation, substrate
  scoring, and threshold calibration for RGC-310B

Source module expansions:
- escape_analysis_certificate.rs: +201 lines of escape analysis
  certificate logic for tracking object escape states
- hindsight_boundary_capture.rs: +141 lines for capturing boundary
  conditions in hindsight analysis passes
- seqlock_candidate_inventory.rs: +210 lines expanding candidate
  inventory tracking for seqlock optimization
- seqlock_rollout_guard.rs: +148 lines extending rollout guard logic
- regime_signature_feature.rs: +114 lines for regime signature
  feature extraction
- zero_placeholder_scan.rs: +98 lines expanding placeholder scan
  coverage
- control_plane_benchmark_split_report.rs: +130 lines expanding
  the CLI report generator
- parser_gap_inventory.rs: refactored 44 lines
- control_plane_benchmark_split_gate.rs: +8 lines
- lowering_gap_inventory.rs: minor fix

Test expansions:
- control_plane_benchmark_split_gate: +89 lines
- security_hardening_enrichment_integration: +157 lines refactored

Docs: CONTROL_PLANE_BENCHMARK_SPLIT_GATE.md update
Beads tracker: sync state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -101,6 +101,7 @@ Implemented tests include:
 All heavy Rust commands are offloaded through `rch` in the suite runner:
 
 ```bash
+./scripts/run_control_plane_benchmark_split_gate_suite.sh bundle
 ./scripts/run_control_plane_benchmark_split_gate_suite.sh ci
 ./scripts/e2e/control_plane_benchmark_split_gate_replay.sh test
 ```
